sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71401" key="nwta/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νωτ-άρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">αἴρω</etym>) <sense id="n71401.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying on the back,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
